titleStmt.title: SII 37.252: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 252. (A.R. No. B 358 of 1940-41.) Peddamuḍiyam, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab paved in the floor of the mukha-maṇḍapa of the Lakshmīnarasimha temple.
This is dated only in the cyclic year Ānanda, Nija-jyēshṭha ba. 5, Wednesday.

It records a grant of land as mānya by 108 mahājanas of Brāhmalamuḍiyam-agrahāram to two artisans for having built Śikhara to the temple of Narasimha and for its permanent up keep and repairs. In characters of 17th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śubhamastu . Ānaṁda saṁvatsara nija jēṣṭa ba 5 bu brāṁhala muḍiyaṁ Agrahārasthitā
śēṣa vi¨rdvamahājanāluṁnnu vaḍlakāḷahastigāri śiddābattuṁḍu jaṁgaṁ Āmahādēvuṁḍu bugayyagāri A
yyapa Arakola śivaliṁgayagāri sēsina pedatiṁmmayya cinatiṁmmayagāru jana yiddarikiṁnni yicci
na śāsana kramameṭlaṁnnanu śrī nṛsuṁha dēvuni śikharaṁ kaṭṭina nimityaṁ mīku mānyaṁ beṭṭina cēnu mānyaṁ paṁdumukuṁnnu vivaraṁ pratakaṁdukū
ri ceruvuku paḍamara cauṭacēni sthaḷaṁ kritaṁ raghunāyakulaku celli vaccē mānyapucēnu paṁdumunu yī cēniki dakṣaṇāna yī cēni poṁdanu 2
ṁ yaṁdumuṁnu vuttaramaṁdu cēni poṁdanu kha 10 yēdumuṁnnu Āṁ cēnu puṭṭiṁṭilōnu raghunāyakulaku mānyaṁ dakṣaṇāna sthānaṁ vārini vo
ppiṁcina mānyaṁ . paṁddumugāka vuttarāna kaḍavū paṁddumu cēnuṁnnu mīku sarvamānyaṁgānu yistimi ganaka yī paṁdumu cēnuṁ
mī putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkastāyigānu Anubhaviṁstunna sukhāna bratikēdi . mīku kaṭṭina śikharaṁ kālāṁttarala śidilaṁ
Āyanāyanā suṁnnamu rasa va¨rgamūnnu modalugānu mīru padilaṁ śāyagalavaĀru yī prakārana nūṭa yanamaṁḍḍi mahājanāla pādālana tappa
kanapaḍagalaḥAvāraṁ mā māṭanaṁmmi yī cēnu Anubhaviṁstuṁnnu sukhāna bratikēdi Ani yiccina sthitāśēṣa vidvan mahājanāluṁnnu saṁmatiṁ
cci vēyiṁcina śilāśāsanaṁ ... śrī
Digital edition of SII 37.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
